title: People of Pisces
location: A seven-story musician's tavern made of ancient kauri wood on a flowery hill
situation: Manus is sitting at a cloverleaf table inside the People of Pisces. He just had a tense standoff with red-haired Shield Doncellas who surrounded him when he unsheathed his Cuatro blade. The Exhumerator watched from the balcony. The tension was broken by a pianist playing Son Borinqueños. He is waiting and watching.
knows: He came to the People of Pisces specifically to find The Exhumerator
The Exhumerator is a leggy tall woman with red hair who watched him from the balcony
The Shield Doncellas are red-haired armed maidens who serve The Exhumerator
His Cuatro blade is rare and recognizable to those who know what it is
He is a skilled warrior and musician from Borinquen Island
He invented Cos-Tech and achieved universal peace — he is a celebrated hero
does_not_know: The Red Noodle Clan by name or detail
That his mask will one day bear blood-stripe kintsugi scars
The GRATS as a formed squad
Anything about Kuniklo Senmorta or the Rabbit Kings
